name: product-principles-toolkit
description: Product-principles toolkit — an agent-portable, key-free cross-cutting product-constitution generator. Turns a product idea into a PRINCIPLES.md that states a single north-star and a small set of non-negotiable, falsifiable principles (each with a testable claim and a clear violation signal), so the same constitution can govern design, spec, and code instead of each layer drifting on its own. Runs inside any coding-agent host using the host's own model — no API keys, no external services — and emits a portable Markdown artifact that downstream design / spec / code-generation skills can read and enforce.
